worker's compensation Medicare Set-Aside Arrangements (WCMSA). 

SHORT NAME: CLM_RSDL_PYMT_IND_CD 

LONG NAME: CLM_RSDL_PYMT_IND_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: X = Residual Payment 

COMMENT: Normally, CWF does not allow a secondary payment on MSP involving ORM or WCMSA, so the RPI will 
be used to allow CWF to make an exception to its normal routine. 

This field comes from the Claim Residual Payment Indicator Code (CLM-RSDL-PMT-IND-CD) that is 
present on the first
